meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Cloned Vishing : A case study  - Katherine Rackliffe
meta.description: We ran a research study at Brigham Young University where we tested a novel phishing technique where AI voice cloning is used to imitate specific people. This talk will discuss the results of the study and potential safeguards to prevent these phishing scams.
